case_title: CSV HOSPITALITY MANAGEMENT LLC VS. JERRIA FAIRLEY ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CSV HOSPITALITY MANAGEMENT LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FAIRLEY, JERRIA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 64 TURK STREET #510, CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT FAIRLEY, JERRIA
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CSV HOSPITALITY MANAGEMENT LLC AS TO DEFENDANT FAIRLEY, JERRIA

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CSV HOSPITALITY MANAGEMENT LLC AS TO DEFENDANT FAIRLEY, JERRIA DOES 1 TO 10 NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CSV HOSPITALITY MANAGEMENT LLC
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT FAIRLEY, JERRIA
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CSV HOSPITALITY MANAGEMENT LLC SERVED SEP-10-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FAIRLEY, JERRIA
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT FAIRLEY, JERRIA
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10

DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE [$16.76 PER DAY] FILED BY PLAINTIFF CSV HOSPITALITY MANAGEMENT LLC
